zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke於1423年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG22歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam39歲。他於1443年與Lady Anne Devereux結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1408年登記服兵役。他去世於1469年7月27日在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年46歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾特特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke于1423年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG22岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam39岁。他于1443年与Lady Anne Devereux结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1408年登记服兵役。他去世于1469年7月27日在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年46岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾特特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke was born in 1423, in Wales, his father, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, was 22 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 39. He married Lady Anne Devereux in 1443. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1408. He died on 27 July 1469, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke est né en 1423, à Galles, son père, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Devereux en 1443. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1408. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1469, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke 1423 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG 22 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 39. Er hat 1443 Lady Anne Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1408 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 27. Juli 1469 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke è nato il nel 1423 nel Galles, il suo padre, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Devereux nel 1443. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1408. Morì il 27 luglio 1469, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembrokeが1423年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KGは22歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは39歳であった。1443年にLady Anne Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年に兵役登録をした。彼は1469年7月27日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで46歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアティンテルンティンテルン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke(이)가 1423년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1443년 Lady Anne Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1469년 7월 27일 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 틴터 틴터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.from 26 July 1469 to 27 July 1469: de 26 de julho de 1469 a 27 de julho de 1469
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke nasceu em 1423, em Gales, seu pai, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Devereux em 1443. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1408. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1469, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke родился в 1423 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Devereux в 1443 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1408 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 27 июля 1469 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности тинтирн эбби, тинтирн, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.from 26 July 1469 to 27 July 1469: desde 26 de julio de 1469 hasta 27 de julio de 1469
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke nació en 1423, en Gales, su papá, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Devereux en 1443. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1408. Murió el 27 de julio de 1469, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Tintern Abbey, Tintern, Monmouthshire, Gales.
